title: Stunspot’s Guide to Macroeconomics
description: A model-facing macroeconomic knowledge canon for AI/RAG use, covering monetary hierarchy, liquidity transmission, credit creation, central banking, fiscal systems, banking intermediation, asset-pricing regimes, geoeconomic power, innovation finance, information liquidity, crisis cascades, macro diagnostics, and institutional strategy. The repository includes 13 source reports, 4 compiled upload packs, and 1 omnibus bundle.
